mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_LOGIN_HISTORY ( emp_id, login_ip, login_status, login_result, login_time ) VALUES ( #{emp_id}, #{login_ip}, #{login_status}, #{login_result}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT login_status FROM USER_LOGIN_HISTORY WHERE emp_id = #{emp_id} ORDER BY login_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_LOGIN_HISTORY WHERE emp_id = #{emp_id} AND login_result = 'FAIL' AND login_time > IFNULL(( SELECT MAX(login_time) FROM USER_LOGIN_HISTORY WHERE emp_id = #{emp_id} AND login_result = 'SUCCESS' ), '2000-01-01') AND login_time > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR)
